name: instant-api — tier-upgrade TTL-promote failures [P1, paid user's deploys still auto-expire]
description: P1. Page on ANY occurrence of an outcome='error' tick on instant_tier_upgrade_ttl_promote_total. This counter fires from handleSubscriptionCharged in api/internal/handlers/billing.go after a successful tier upgrade, when models.PromoteDeploymentTTLsForTeam errors. The upgrade itself committed (fail-open) but the team's default_deployment_ttl_policy may still be 'auto_24h' and their pre-upgrade auto_24h deploys may still auto-expire — exactly the regression the user reported on 2026-05-31 (paid user got 'expires in 6 hours' email after upgrade). Operator action: run `kubectl exec -n instant deploy/instant-api -- /app/backfill-tier-ttl -apply` (or `go run ./cmd/backfill-tier-ttl -apply` from a checkout) to repair the residual; the script is idempotent. Threshold is ABOVE 0 over 10m so a single failure pages within a renewal cycle.

nrql.query: SELECT sum(instant_tier_upgrade_ttl_promote_total) FROM Metric WHERE metricName = 'instant_tier_upgrade_ttl_promote_total' AND outcome = 'error'
